description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker service and a single test stage. Add a job named job1 that runs only on the master branch. In the test stage, job1 executes: `docker-compose up -d && sleep 10`, then `docker ps`, then sets `testResults="echo $(curl -i /tests/basic/index.cfm?opt_run=true&reporter=json&target=tests.basic.basic)"`, echoes the variable, and fails with exit 1 if the output does not contain \"http/1.1 200\" (checked via grep). The pipeline does not define caches or artifacts.
